Meals.rules: Capped at ₹1,500/day. Receipts must show itemized GST breakdown for input tax credit.

Transport.rules: Local transport up to ₹2,500/day. Outstation travel requires prior manager approval.

Lodging.rules: Budget hotels up to ₹5,000/night. Mini-bar and personal items are not reimbursable.

Retail / Lifestyle.rules: Includes textiles, clothing, and lifestyle retail. Only permissible for 'Client Gifts' or 'Employee Uniforms'. Requires a justifying event ID.

audit_logic.step_1: OCR Text Extraction: Identify Merchant, Items, Amount, and GST components.
audit_logic.step_2: Category Classification: Use keywords (e.g., 'Lifestyle', 'Food') to match against policy categories.
audit_logic.step_3: Limit Validation: Cross-reference amount against the category threshold (₹).
audit_logic.step_4: Violation Check: Flag prohibited items (e.g. Alcohol) or missing GST details.
audit_logic.step_5: Risk Scoring: Assign status (Approved, Flagged, Rejected) based on compliance severity.
